_fixture_note: Synthetic Sysmon EventID 10 (ProcessAccess) record. Derived from the real, public sample sample_evtx/EVTX-ATTACK-SAMPLES/Credential Access/sysmon_10_1_memdump_comsvcs_minidump.evtx (RecordID 32156), which demonstrates the comsvcs.dll MiniDump call-trace/access-mask signature but dumps notepad.exe (PID 4868) rather than lsass.exe as its target. TargetImage/TgtPID below are swapped to lsass.exe to validate the full rule (all three selections + the EDR filter) end to end; every other field is unchanged from the real sample.
_expected_match: lsass_memory_dump_via_comsvcs_minidump.yml fires: selection_target (TargetImage endswith \lsass.exe) true, selection_calltrace (CallTrace contains comsvcs.dll) true, selection_access (GrantedAccess contains 0x1fffff) true, filter_optional_edr_agents (SourceImage rundll32.exe not in the MsMpEng/MsSense/SenseIR list) does not suppress it -> condition holds, level high.
